about.title: About Our Firm
about.para1: Basava Business Consultants is a Lusaka-based firm dedicated to delivering comprehensive and reliable financial services. We specialize in accounting, taxation and business advisory services tailored to meet the needs of individuals, startups, SMEs, and established companies.
about.para2: Our team is committed to providing accurate financial information, ensuring regulatory compliance, and supporting long-term business growth through strategic insights and professional expertise.

support.title: Growing SMEs
support.text: Moving from informal record-keeping to organized books, so you always know where your business stands financially.

support.title: New Businesses
support.text: Getting registered and compliant from day one — PAYE, NAPSA, NHIMA and VAT set up correctly the first time.

support.title: Established Companies
support.text: Keeping records audit-ready year-round, so reporting season is a formality, not a scramble.

cta.title: Need Financial Guidance?
cta.text: Partner with our experts for reliable financial solutions

faq.q: Do I need to register for VAT?
faq.a: It depends on your annual turnover and the nature of your business activities. We can review your figures against current ZRA thresholds and advise whether VAT registration applies to you.

faq.q: What's the difference between PAYE, NAPSA, and NHIMA?
faq.a: PAYE is income tax deducted from employee salaries and remitted to ZRA. NAPSA is the statutory pension contribution, and NHIMA is the national health insurance contribution. All three are typically processed together through payroll.

faq.q: I run a small business — do I really need an accountant?
faq.a: Even small and early-stage businesses benefit from proper bookkeeping, since it keeps you compliant, makes tax season painless, and gives you real numbers to make decisions with. We offer packages scaled to business size.

faq.q: Can you help if my books are already behind or disorganized?
faq.a: Yes — catching up backlogged records and reconciling past periods is one of our most common engagements. We'll assess where things stand and bring you current.

faq.q: Do you work with businesses outside Lusaka?
faq.a: Yes, we support clients across Zambia remotely, with in-person meetings available for clients based in or visiting Lusaka.

team.name: Sri Basava

team.name: Durga Rao Basava
team.bio: Director with over a decade of experience in engineering and project management. Responsible for administration operations, guiding project execution, and ensuring quality delivery across multiple large-scale projects.

team.name: Charan Basava
team.bio: Chief Technical Officer with extensive experience in overseeing technical operations, system architecture, and project execution. Skilled in leading engineering teams, ensuring technical excellence, and aligning technology strategies with business goals.
